query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A textured surface covered in irregular, reflective fragmented shapes rendered in deep crimson and bright red tones with scattered flecks of orange and yellow light catching across the ridges and valleys.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily abstracted, nearly unrecognizable surface rendered as a fractured field of jagged crimson shards where any identifiable subject has dissolved into pure texture, the aggressive red-black palette clashing with visceral intensity while fine detail smears into an undifferentiated mass of angular blotches and scattered molten orange highlights.
